title: Season 3 — New Ranked System
summary: The new ranked season brings an improved ELO system, new placement matches, and updated rank tiers. Compete with players worldwide on the Europe, Asia, and World maps.
content:
## Season 3 is Live!

We're excited to announce the launch of **Season 3** with a completely revamped ranking system.

### What's New

- **Improved ELO calculations** — more accurate skill representation
- **New placement pool** — 5 placement matches to calibrate your rank
- **Updated rank tiers** — Bronze through Grandmaster
- **Kill bonus pool** — earn extra rating from eliminations

### How to Participate

Join any ranked game on Battle.net with 16+ players. Your rating will automatically be tracked through the wc3stats integration.

Good luck on the battlefield, commanders!

title: World Map — Now Available
summary: The long-awaited World map is here! Featuring 212 countries, 555 cities, and 74 ports across all continents.
content:
## The World Map Has Arrived

After months of development, the **World Map** is now available for all game modes.

### Map Stats

| Stat | Value |
|------|-------|
| Countries | 212 |
| Cities | 555 |
| Ports | 74 |

### Features

- All continents represented with accurate borders
- Naval routes connecting major oceans
- Balanced country distribution for competitive play
- Support for up to 23 players

Download the latest version from Battle.net and try it out!

title: Spring 2025 Tournament Announced
summary: The first official Risk Reforged tournament of 2025 is coming! Sign up now to compete for prizes and glory.
content:
## Spring 2025 Tournament

We're hosting the first major tournament of the year!

### Details

- **Format:** Single elimination, Best of 3
- **Map:** Europe (Standard mode)
- **Players:** 32 slots available
- **Prizes:** Community recognition and bragging rights

### Schedule

- Registration: January 20 – February 15
- Group Stage: February 22 – March 8
- Playoffs: March 15 – March 22
- Finals: March 29

Stay tuned for more details on our Discord server!
